title: onobrychis ornata subsp. vanensis
intro: Onobrychis ornata subsp. vanensis, commonly known as a subspecies of the Ornate Bird's-foot Trefoil, is a plant belonging to the Fabaceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Onobrychis ornata subsp. vanensis include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and skin infections. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
